content: Create seed_despensa.sql with categories, units, ingredients, unit_conversions, unaccent extension, helper function, realtime publication
Apply seed data via REST API (categories, units, ingredients, unit_conversions all inserted) + smaller DDL file (despensa_ddl.sql) for user to paste once for unaccent + realtime publication
Build analytics safe wrapper for PostHog
Build AddPantryItemModal (MOD-001) with catalog search + new ingredient creation + form
Update PantryScreen (PAN-001) with search, segments, grouped lists, FAB, realtime
End-to-end testing with testing_agent_v3 (100% pass, 0 critical bugs)
